projectDescription: Annapurna Art is a curated online marketplace and gallery platform connecting artists and collectors worldwide through artwork sales, virtual and physical exhibitions, and expert art advisory services.
keyFeatures: Curated art marketplace with verified artists and original artworks
Artist Dashboard for managing listings, sales, orders, and virtual exhibitions
Make an Offer feature for collectors to negotiate artwork prices
Physical gallery in Bhaktapur, Nepal for in-person exhibition experiences
Virtual Exhibition Platform for immersive online gallery experiences
Art Advisory service connecting collectors with expert curators
Global insured shipping with customs fees included at checkout
Role Management for artists to delegate account access to team members
Secure payments via Stripe with 14-day payment release after delivery
14-day return window for buyers on eligible artworks
publicApiSurface: Artist Dashboard: Overview, Analytics, Artworks, Offers, Finance, Virtual Exhibitions, Role Management, Orders

Artwork listing fields: title, description, price, Make an Offer toggle, dominant colors, category, subject, style, medium, material, tags, dimensions, weight, pickup location, background/virtual wall image
Virtual Exhibition creation and publishing via Artist Dashboard
Physical gallery: Radhe Radhe, Bhaktapur, Nepal
Art categories: Painting, Drawing, Mixed Media, Printmaking, Sculpture, Digital, Photography
